title: Yank It Out
body:
With surgical precision, you're able to pull out arrows from your body and use them to shoot back at your enemy.

Quick how to:
- right click either **on block** or **in air** with **empty hand** or **arrows on slot** to pull out arrow from your body
- you can use **keepArrows** gamerule to make them stick to player forever (till logout/death). Default: *true*
